## Scope and safety

<!-- Note lifecycle, canonical-state, source-authorization, privacy, security, and compatibility implications. -->

## Validation

<!-- List the exact checks you ran and their results. -->

- [ ] Focused tests were added or updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] All affected Python, website, documentation, migration, or container checks pass.
- [ ] Documentation matches the implemented behavior.
- [ ] Generated files were updated only through their owning commands.
- [ ] No `.env`, database, SQLite sidecar, credential, cookie, private HTML, log, cache, or build artifact is included.
- [ ] No unauthorized live LinkedIn access was performed.
- [ ] Lockfile changes are intentional and correspond to dependency or metadata changes.
